associatedRepositoryNames.description: A list of names of the repositories that have been associated with the template.

errors.description: A list of any errors that might have occurred while attempting to create the association between the template and the repositories.

conflicts.description: A list of conflicts for each file, including the conflict metadata and the hunks of the differences between the files.

nextToken.description: An enumeration token that can be used in a request to return the next batch of the results.

errors.description: A list of any errors returned while describing the merge conflicts for each file.

destinationCommitId.description: The commit ID of the destination commit specifier that was used in the merge evaluation.

sourceCommitId.description: The commit ID of the source commit specifier that was used in the merge evaluation.

baseCommitId.description: The commit ID of the merge base.

disassociatedRepositoryNames.description: A list of repository names that have had their association with the template removed.

errors.description: A list of any errors that might have occurred while attempting to remove the association between the template and the repositories.

commits.description: An array of commit data type objects, each of which contains information about a specified commit.

errors.description: Returns any commit IDs for which information could not be found. For example, if one of the commit IDs was a shortened SHA ID or that commit was not found in the specified repository, the ID returns an error object with more information.

repositories.description: A list of repositories returned by the batch get repositories operation.

repositoriesNotFound.description: Returns a list of repository names for which information could not be found.

errors.description: Returns information about any errors returned when attempting to retrieve information about the repositories.

approvalRuleTemplate.description: The content and structure of the created approval rule template.

commitId.description: The full commit ID of the commit that contains your committed file changes.

treeId.description: The full SHA-1 pointer of the tree information for the commit that contains the commited file changes.

filesAdded.description: The files added as part of the committed file changes.

filesUpdated.description: The files updated as part of the commited file changes.

filesDeleted.description: The files deleted as part of the committed file changes.

pullRequest.description: Information about the newly created pull request.

commitId.description: The full commit ID of the commit that contains your merge results.

treeId.description: The full SHA-1 pointer of the tree information for the commit that contains the merge results.

approvalRuleTemplateId.description: The system-generated ID of the deleted approval rule template. If the template has been previously deleted, the only response is a 200 OK.

deletedBranch.description: Information about the branch deleted by the operation, including the branch name and the commit ID that was the tip of the branch.

comment.description: Information about the comment you just deleted.

commitId.description: The full commit ID of the commit that contains the change that deletes the file.

blobId.description: The blob ID removed from the tree as part of deleting the file.

treeId.description: The full SHA-1 pointer of the tree information for the commit that contains the delete file change.

filePath.description: The fully qualified path to the file to be deleted, including the full name and extension of that file.

approvalRuleId.description:
The ID of the deleted approval rule.

If the approval rule was deleted in an earlier API call, the response is 200 OK without content.

repositoryId.description: The ID of the repository that was deleted.

evaluation.description: The result of the evaluation, including the names of the rules whose conditions have been met (if any), the names of the rules whose conditions have not been met (if any), whether the pull request is in the approved state, and whether the pull request approval rule has been set aside by an override.

commitId.description: The commit ID of the merge in the destination or target branch.

treeId.description: The tree ID of the merge in the destination or target branch.

commitId.description: The commit ID of the merge in the destination or target branch.

treeId.description: The tree ID of the merge in the destination or target branch.

commitId.description: The commit ID of the merge in the destination or target branch.

treeId.description: The tree ID of the merge in the destination or target branch.

pullRequest.description: Information about the specified pull request, including the merge.

repositoryName.description: The name of the repository where you posted a comment on the comparison between commits.

beforeCommitId.description: In the directionality you established, the full commit ID of the before commit.

afterCommitId.description: In the directionality you established, the full commit ID of the after commit.

beforeBlobId.description: In the directionality you established, the blob ID of the before blob.

afterBlobId.description: In the directionality you established, the blob ID of the after blob.

location.description: The location of the comment in the comparison between the two commits.

comment.description: The content of the comment you posted.

repositoryName.description: The name of the repository where you posted a comment on a pull request.

pullRequestId.description: The system-generated ID of the pull request.

beforeCommitId.description: The full commit ID of the commit in the source branch used to create the pull request, or in the case of an updated pull request, the full commit ID of the commit used to update the pull request.

afterCommitId.description: The full commit ID of the commit in the destination branch where the pull request is merged.

beforeBlobId.description: In the directionality of the pull request, the blob ID of the before blob.

afterBlobId.description: In the directionality of the pull request, the blob ID of the after blob.

location.description: The location of the change where you posted your comment.

comment.description: The content of the comment you posted.
Information about the reply to a comment.

commitId.description: The full SHA ID of the commit that contains this file change.

blobId.description: The ID of the blob, which is its SHA-1 pointer.

treeId.description: The full SHA-1 pointer of the tree information for the commit that contains this file change.

configurationId.description: The system-generated unique ID for the create or update operation.

successfulExecutions.description: The list of triggers that were successfully tested. This list provides the names of the triggers that were successfully tested, separated by commas.

failedExecutions.description: The list of triggers that were not tested. This list provides the names of the triggers that could not be tested, separated by commas.

approvalRuleTemplate.description: Returns information about an approval rule template.
The structure and content of the updated approval rule template.
The structure and content of the updated approval rule template.

originalKmsKeyId.description: The ID of the encryption key formerly used to encrypt and decrypt the repository.
